mnemonics.title: LIME Steps
mnemonics.content: PERTURB (Generate samples) → WEIGHT (By proximity) → LEARN (Surrogate model) → EXPLAIN (Interpret coefficients)

acronyms.usage: Used when discussing game-theoretic feature attribution

visualTips.visualization: Imagine waterfall charts where each feature's contribution flows from baseline to prediction

analogies.analogy: Like using a magnifying glass to examine model behavior around a specific instance
